title: MegaMace
description: The Mace now sounds like MEGAKNIGHT
body:
for context, a friend told me to make the mace sound like Mega Knight, so i did lol

if you dont play Clash Royale, then you wont really know what this is about but simply, this resource pack just makes the mace yell "Mega Knight" from Clash Royale. thats basically it!

dont sue me supercell
